svg.text: AWS EKS — Multi-AZ High Availability Architecture
3 Availability Zones • Zero SPOF • Automatic Failover • RPO~0 / RTO<60s
Runs in AWS-owned VPC spanning us-east-1a, us-east-1b, us-east-1c — fully managed, no customer access
↓ ENI cross-account connections into each AZ private subnet ↓
HTTPS :443 • ACM TLS • WAF v2 • Health Checks • Connection Draining
1 NAT GW per AZ — if AZ-a NAT fails, AZ-b and AZ-c continue independently (no cross-AZ dependency)
Istio Ambient Mesh — mTLS STRICT across all AZs • Cross-zone service discovery • L4/L7 traffic mgmt
replication.factor=3 • min.insync.replicas=2 • Quorum survives 1 AZ loss
ElastiCache Multi-AZ • Automatic failover ~30s • DNS auto-update • CSRF tokens + session cache
HA Summary: AWS-managed control plane • 3 NAT GWs • Nodes across 3 AZs • Aurora 6-copy storage • MSK 3-broker quorum • Redis Multi-AZ • Pod topology spread
Every component spans 3 AZs • Automatic failover at every layer • Zero manual intervention for AZ failure
Control plane managed by AWS • ENIs injected into customer VPC • etcd replicated across all AZs
BookStore Platform • AWS EKS Multi-AZ HA Architecture • Terraform IaC
